name: Jacquou Parc
description: Jacquou Parc is a family amusement park and water park located in the commune of Saint-Félix-de-Reillac-et-Mortemart, near Le Bugue in the Dordogne department of southwestern France.  It opened in 1995 The park features a mix of mechanical rides, water slides, and animal encounters, making it especially popular with families and children.  The park operates seasonally, typically from early July to early September.
